entry.title: New: Reso 24-188 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"APPROVING EXCEPTIONS FROM THE CONDITIONS OF SECTION 3.35.070, MAUI COUNTY CODE, FOR THE RESIDENTIAL WORKFORCE HOUSING PROJECT OWNED BY WAIKAPU DEVELOPMENT VENTURE LLC AND LOCATED ON A PORTION OF PROPERTY IN WAILUKU, MAUI, HAWAI'I, AND FURTHER IDENTIFIED FOR REAL PROPERTY TAX PURPOSES AS TAX MAP KEY (2) 3-5-002:011"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
